seoTitle: Yarrawonga vs Yarrawonga South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Yarrawonga and Yarrawonga South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Yarrawonga vs Yarrawonga South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yarrawonga and Yarrawonga South.
heading: Yarrawonga vs Yarrawonga South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarrawonga, Victoria and Yarrawonga South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yarrawonga has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Yarrawonga South (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarrawonga or Yarrawonga South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarrawonga has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Yarrawonga South scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarrawonga scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Yarrawonga South scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarrawonga or Yarrawonga South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yarrawonga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
